violations.description: Table header row uses <td> elements styled to look like headers instead of proper <th> elements. Screen readers cannot identify column headers, making the data table incomprehensible to assistive technology users.
violations.reference_fix: <thead><tr><th scope="col">Course</th><th scope="col">Instructor</th><th scope="col">Credits</th><th scope="col">Midterm</th><th scope="col">Final</th><th scope="col">Grade</th></tr></thead>

violations.description: Data table has no <caption> element to provide an accessible description of the table's purpose and content.

page_description: A student grade report page showing a data table of courses and grades. The table header row uses styled <td> elements instead of <th> and has no caption.
